arts.ttl: 'Love it': James Maddison raves about £20m Tottenham player who shone against Coventry
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur were able to give their fans something to cheer about by the end of their League Cup meeting with Coventry City on Wednesday...

arts.ttl: 'I know this sounds silly': Paul Merson makes interesting Tottenham and Newcastle claim
arts.sum: Paul Merson claims that Tottenham Hotspur have played better than Newcastle United this season, despite the Magpies being unbeaten.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins says Tottenham have a truly 'top player' in their ranks that Coventry struggled to deal with last night
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur managed to claim victory from the jaws of defeat on Wednesday night as they went through to the fourth round of the League...

arts.ttl: Ange and Rodgers sliding doors moment shows Celtic what they've won as Tottenham fans cry they've had ENOUGH
arts.sum: While Postecoglou's crisis threatened to hit breaking point, Rodgers soared to new heights

arts.ttl: 'I'm told': Fabrizio Romano shares update he's now hearing about Cristian Romero and Tottenham
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has shared an update he's been told about Cristian Romero at Tottenham amid Real Madrid interest.

arts.ttl: 'He's got to': Gabriel Agbonlahor says what Ange Postecoglou needs to do with Dominic Solanke now
Tottenham fans reveal concern for Brennan Johnson after noticing his response to scoring winner against Coventry - after Spurs youngster suffered abuse online and withdrew from Instagram
arts.sum: Supporters have been posting sympathetic messages in response after the forward deleted his Instagram account following a slew of anonymous abuse.

arts.ttl: Spurs undroppable sends new Postecoglou message as Spence call questioned
arts.sum: James Maddison, who also came on in the closing stages as Spurs chased an equaliser, also had a key role to play in Spence's strike after a smart ball with the outside of his right foot between two Coventry players picked out Kulusevski, who in turn then played through Tottenham's left-back to finish off the move. Looking to attack at every opportunity to help his team back into the game, the 24-year-old also contributed defensively with Coventry causing the Lilywhites some real problems in the second half as they went close to adding to Thomas-Asante's goal on a couple of occasions.

arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson makes feelings clear to Tottenham fans after deactivating Instagram account
arts.sum: Brennan Johnson netted in stoppage time for Tottenham against Coventry on Wednesday but gave a muted celebration - having previously deactivated his Instagram after their 1-0 loss to Arsenal

arts.ttl: Gary Neville shares the change he’s noticed in Mauricio Pochettino since leaving Tottenham
arts.sum: Mauricio Pochettino is back in management as the new head coach of the USA. Pochettino has taken the step into international management after leaving Chelsea,...
